allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.notemaker import generate_notes, suggest_glossary_terms, save_note, get_api_key, set_api_key; print\(''imports OK''\)")

hooks.command: output=$(venv/Scripts/python -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1); rc=$?; echo "$output"; [ $rc -eq 0 ] || exit 2
hooks.rewakeMessage: Tests failed after your last edit. Output:
